tasks.label: Run mobile smoke tests for Allure
args: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'allure-results' -Force | Out-Null; C:\maestro\bin\maestro.bat test --format JUNIT --output allure-results/smoke.xml flows\mobile\smoke

tasks.label: Run web smoke tests for Allure
args: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'allure-results' -Force | Out-Null; C:\maestro\bin\maestro.bat test --format JUNIT --output allure-results/web-smoke.xml --env WEB_BASE_URL=https://maudau.com.ua flows\web\smoke

tasks.label: Run mobile smoke tests and open Allure report
args: [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; & { if (Test-Path 'allure-results') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force allure-results }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'allure-results' -Force | Out-Null; C:\maestro\bin\maestro.bat test --format JUNIT --output allure-results/smoke.xml flows\mobile\smoke; .\scripts\generate-allure-report.ps1; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force allure-results }

tasks.label: Run web smoke tests and open Allure report
args: [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; & { if (Test-Path 'allure-results') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force allure-results\*.xml } else { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'allure-results' -Force | Out-Null }; C:\maestro\bin\maestro.bat test --format JUNIT --output allure-results/web-smoke.xml --env WEB_BASE_URL=https://maudau.com.ua flows\web\smoke; .\scripts\generate-allure-report.ps1; Remove-Item -Force allure-results\*.xml }

tasks.label: Run all smoke tests and open Allure report
args: [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; & { if (Test-Path 'allure-results') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force allure-results }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'allure-results' -Force | Out-Null; C:\maestro\bin\maestro.bat test --format JUNIT --output allure-results/smoke.xml flows\mobile\smoke; C:\maestro\bin\maestro.bat test --format JUNIT --output allure-results/web-smoke.xml --env WEB_BASE_URL=https://maudau.com.ua flows\web\smoke; .\scripts\generate-allure-report.ps1; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force allure-results }

tasks.label: Run web smoke tests in headless mode (1920x1080)
args: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'allure-results' -Force | Out-Null; C:\maestro\bin\maestro.bat test --format JUNIT --output allure-results/web-smoke.xml --env WEB_BASE_URL=https://maudau.com.ua --screen-size=1920x1080 flows\web\smoke

tasks.label: Run web smoke tests in headless mode and open Allure report
args: [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; & { if (Test-Path 'allure-results') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force allure-results }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'allure-results' -Force | Out-Null; C:\maestro\bin\maestro.bat test --format JUNIT --output allure-results/web-smoke.xml --env WEB_BASE_URL=https://maudau.com.ua --screen-size=1920x1080 flows\web\smoke; .\scripts\generate-allure-report.ps1; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force allure-results }

inputs.description: Enter the full path to allure.bat or allure.exe
